title: Tarzan and the Lost Safari
writer: Montgomery Pittman, Lillie Hayward, Edgar Rice Burroughs
actors: Gordon Scott, Robert Beatty, Yolande Donlan
plot: Tarzan leads five passengers from a downed airplane out of the jungle. En route, white hunter Hawkins tries to sell them to the Oparian chief. Captured by the Oparians and nearly sacrificed to their lion god, the party is saved by...
